message:
fix(parser,func): reject >16-digit hex literals, fix instr() empty needle

1. Hex integer parsing: strip leading zeros before length check, then
   reject >16 significant hex digits instead of silently truncating.
   Matches C SQLite sqlite3DecOrHexToI64 behavior.

2. instr(): return 0 for empty needle or haystack instead of 1, matching
   SQLite's documented behavior where empty strings produce 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
